name: malacca_strait_operational_data
description: Strait of Malacca operational geodata — fishing zones and patrol areas for simulation background entities

properties.name: Malacca Strait — Malaysian Coast Fishing Zone
properties.description: Inshore and nearshore fishing grounds along the Malaysian west coast between Port Dickson and Muar. Active small-vessel fishing traffic typical of Peninsular Malaysia's west coast fisheries.

properties.name: Malacca TSS — Traffic Separation Zone
properties.description: Central no-traffic buffer zone between the northwestbound and southeastbound TSS lanes.
